input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.1.3
            TITLE: the ams, imd, and bspd parts of the shutdown circuit must be normally open

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.1.3: The AMS, IMD, and BSPD parts of the Shutdown Circuit must be Normally Open
EV.7.1.3 The AMS, IMD, and BSPD parts of the Shutdown Circuit must be Normally Open

final_answer: The AMS, IMD, and BSPD parts of the Shutdown Circuit must be Normally Open
